title: Planetary Pioneers

{{Quote|I'm glad that you and the Planetary Pioneers will be able to continue your work, but I'm even happier that you are alive and safe.|[[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]], to [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]]|<ref name="TMM" />}}
The '''Planetary Pioneers''' were a group of [[Pilot/Legends|pilots]] who transported [[Colonist/Legends|colonists]] to uninhabited [[Planet/Legends|planets]] to settle them.

==History==
{{Quote|Some of us will be building homes and schools and power stations.|[[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], to [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]]|<ref name="TMM" />}}
During its final centuries, the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] spent on programs such as the Planetary Pioneers to promote settlement in the [[New Territories/Legends|New Territories]]. As a result, this region of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] remained strongly [[Loyalist/Legends|loyal]] to the Republic and then the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]].<ref name="TEA" />

[[File:Planetary_Pioneers_3.jpg|thumb|left|200px|[[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] aboard an old [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing starfighter]] of the Planetary Pioneers]]
During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], sometime after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] joined the Planetary Pioneers on an [[Unidentified planet (New Academy for Space Pilots)|unidentified planet]].<ref name="TMM" /> Skywalker trained with them at the [[New Academy for Space Pilots]], commanded by [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[General/Legends|General]] [[Oleson]].<ref name="TCSWE">{{CSWECite|II|407|Oleson, General}}</ref> The students of the academy were training to fly young men and women to uninhabited [[Planet/Legends|planets]]. There, those smart and talented people would build new colonies, founded on peace, justice, and good will. Some of the [[Colonist/Legends|colonists]] would build homes, [[school]]s, and [[Power generator/Legends|power stations]]. During that time, the Planetary Pioneers were planning to use the powerful [[Zukonium ray]]s in their power stations. Instead of being used for war and destruction, the Zukonium rays would provide energy for the colonies.<ref name="TMM" />

At some point, [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] came to visit the academy, and Skywalker told her about the work of the Planetary Pioneers. However, the tour was interrupted by an [[emergency siren]]. For unknown reasons, a [[Unidentified maverick moon|small moon]] from a nearby [[Star system/Legends|system]] had been blasted out of its [[Orbit/Legends|orbit]] and was on a collision course with the planet housing the academy. Having no time to evacuate, Skywalker and the Planetary Pioneers boarded their old [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing starfighters]] in an attempt to destroy the maverick [[Moon/Legends|moon]] with Zukonium rays. Using the power of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]], Skywalker was the only [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] able to penetrate the moon's strong [[Magnetic field/Legends|magnetic field]]. He then fired the Zukonium rays at the center of the moon and successfully destroyed it. Skywalker's X-wing was damaged by the explosion, which forced him to make an emergency landing. After his return to the academy, Princess Leia Organa awarded Skywalker a [[medal of honor]] for saving the planet.<ref name="TMM" />

==Behind the scenes==
{{Quote|It was enormous fun exploring the odd nooks and crannies of the ''Star Wars'' universe. For instance, there's an old children's storybook called ''The Maverick Moon'', in which Luke leaves the Rebellion to join the Planetary Pioneers. It doesn't make a lot of sense, but my little boy loved it, so I found a way to work the Planetary Pioneers into the ''Atlas''.|[[Jason Fry]]|<ref name="SWI111">{{InsiderCite|111|Blaster}}</ref>}}
[[File:Planetary_Pioneers.jpg|thumb|right|250px|The Planetary Pioneers attempt to penetrate the [[Unidentified maverick moon|maverick moon's]] strong [[Magnetic field/Legends|magnetic field]]]]
The Planetary Pioneers first appeared in the [[1979]] children's storybook ''[[The Maverick Moon]]'', written by [[Eleanor Ehrhardt]] and illustrated by [[Walter Wright]]. They were later mentioned in the [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'', written by [[Jason Fry]] and [[Daniel Wallace]].
